creator: pa@chalmers.se
text:
In the handbook chaper 20.3.11. Upgrading a Storage Pool in the part about updating EFI boot-code it says you should write the new boot-code with:
gpart bootcode -p /boot/boot1.efifat -i 1 ada1

Aren't you supposed to mount the EFI-boot partition and copy /boot/loader.efi there?

Like:
mount -t msdosfs /dev/ada0p1 /mnt
cp /boot/loader.efi /mnt/efi/boot/BOOTx64.efi
umount /mnt
